{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Saeya's spiritual perception
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Saeya uses spiritual perception.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13">''Uncrowned'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
